response.justification: Bogdan has exceptional technical depth, open-source contributions, and broad experience across stacks and domains, with strong leadership in project execution and mentoring — but lacks demonstrated experience in IT architecture design, UML, and formal project management, and his German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the C1 requirement.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with GISCollective and multiple public tools
Proven full-stack expertise across diverse technologies and environments
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and team knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No explicit evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or formal project management experience
Lacks demonstrated experience in client-facing technical advisory or compliance/risk domains
